name: AerioTV Pairing
description: Pairs AerioTV Fire TV clients with Dispatcharr and serves the AerioTV sync document. Use the link below to open the pairing page. Docs: https://github.com/chickey/AerioTV-Android
author: AerioTV

fields.label: Pairing page
fields.help_text: Open /api/plugins/aeriotv/admin on your Dispatcharr server to link Fire TV devices and manage paired devices. Run 'Get admin link' below if you need a bookmarkable token link.

fields.label: Server base URL
fields.help_text: Returned to AerioTV after pairing. Leave blank to use the address of this Dispatcharr server.

fields.label: API key override
fields.help_text: Only needed if auto-detection of your Dispatcharr API key fails. Leave blank in normal use.

actions.label: Get admin link
actions.description: Generates a tokenised link to the pairing page (valid 30 days). Useful if your browser login doesn't carry through to the page.

actions.label: Clean up expired pairing attempts
actions.description: Removes pending pairing sessions that timed out without being approved.

actions.label: Delete all revoked devices
actions.description: Permanently removes revoked device records. Use the pairing page for individual device management.
